name: Dropgate Server
description: Self-hosted, privacy-first file sharing with hosted upload and P2P transfer
compose:
name: slashnode-dropgate-server
services:
  web:
    image: willtda/dropgate-server:3.0.13
    container_name: dropgate-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SERVER_PORT: '52443'
      SERVER_NAME: Dropgate Server
      ENABLE_WEB_UI: 'true'
      ENABLE_UPLOAD: 'true'
      UPLOAD_ENABLE_E2EE: 'true'
      UPLOAD_PRESERVE_UPLOADS: 'false'
      UPLOAD_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB: '100'
      UPLOAD_MAX_STORAGE_GB: '10'
      UPLOAD_MAX_FILE_LIFETIME_HOURS: '24'
      UPLOAD_MAX_FILE_DOWNLOADS: '1'
      ENABLE_P2P: 'true'
    volumes:
      - web_data-uploads:/usr/src/app/uploads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:52443:52443
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-dropgate-server_web_data-uploads
